title: The Last Garden
notes: A retired florist discovers her late husband secretly planted seeds all over their city. Bittersweet tone. Focus on small discoveries.

title: Two Minutes Late
notes: A small delay changes the trajectory of two strangers' lives. Show the moment of divergence without over-explaining.

title: The Note on the Fridge
notes: A daughter finds a handwritten note from her father she was never meant to read. Quiet emotional reveal. No melodrama.

title: Signal
notes: A software engineer receives a message from an account that has been inactive for ten years. Understated and unsettling.
